name: engineering_storage_runtime_bug
observation: Codex MCP may start sekd from /, so --global must not validate project cwd.
reason: storage/runtime bug fix in the codebase

name: local_ai_llama_embeddings
observation: llama.cpp embeddings require --embeddings --pooling mean for SEK vector search.
reason: local model serving and embeddings setup

name: agent_behavior_agents_file
observation: Claude Code captures events reliably after AGENTS.md includes an explicit final-response checkpoint.

name: personal_working_preference
observation: The user prefers concise recommendations before implementation when tradeoffs are unclear.

name: company_announcement_norm
observation: The AI initiatives group wants repo announcements framed as open-source runtime feedback requests.

name: source_channel_is_not_module
observation: A note entered through the llama.cpp web UI says the user wants shorter final answers unless implementation details are requested.
reason: web UI is only the source; the content is a user preference

name: default_to_engineering_when_unclear
observation: Keep the default module when a note does not clearly belong to a specialized memory type.
reason: low-confidence routing should fall back to engineering
